headline: AutoZone To Rally Around 17%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Tuesday
summary: Analysts change outlook on top names: Truist cut KFY price target, Oppenheimer raised AZO target, B. Riley slashed YEXT target, Stifel cut MTN target, RBC raised KNTK target, Truist cut MAA target, Wells Fargo raised XENE target, Citigroup raised HIMS target.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Mid-America Apartment, Lowers Price Target to $142
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Michael Lewis   maintains Mid-America Apartment (NYSE:MAA) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $146 to $142.

headline: Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) Gets Price Target Cuts from Barclays and BTIG
summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) is included among the 13 Best REIT Dividend Stocks to Invest in. Top 100 Places Where the Rich People Own Real Estate On March 6, Barclays analyst Richard Hightower lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) to $138 from $144. The firm kept an Equal Weight […]
